headline: Head of Developer Relations @ Stellarpay | Ex-Twilio, Ex-Stripe | Conference speaker
summary: Developer relations leader with a decade of experience building DevRel functions and developer-facing content at Stripe, Twilio, and now Stellarpay, where he built the DevRel org from scratch. Frequent conference speaker and SDK/API-experience specialist.

experience.title: Head of Developer Relations
experience.description: Built the DevRel function from 1 to 9 people across 3 regions. Launched the public API docs rewrite and a new SDK generation pipeline (7 languages), cutting time-to-first-API-call from 45 min to 6 min.

experience.title: Senior Developer Advocate, Platform
experience.description: Led platform DevRel for Twilio's Programmable Voice and Video APIs. Regular speaker at SIGNAL, KubeCon, and regional dev meetups.

experience.title: Developer Advocate
experience.description: Early DevRel hire (#340). Wrote integration guides and sample apps for the Payments and Connect APIs.

capabilities: Can build a Developer Relations org from zero
Can design SDK-generation pipelines across multiple languages
Can advise on developer-experience / API-onboarding funnels
relevance_summary: Daniel is the go-to contact for building or scaling a Developer Relations function: he's done it twice (Stripe, then from scratch at Stellarpay) after cutting his teeth at Twilio's platform team. Reach out for advice on DevRel hiring, SDK/API onboarding funnels, or conference speaking connections.
